text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... My skin is in a deplorable state. I cannot
abide this.

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you look totally fine to me... But, Yaeno,
I'm a little surprised to find out you have a girly
side to you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The maintenance of a hygienic and presentable
appearance is one of the principles passed down
within the Yaegaki school.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Subjecting a mighty opponent who has bested me
in battle to my disheveled appearance would be
the height of dishonor. Hm, how should I resolve
this?

text_block_list.name: Student A
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow... That reason's way more intense than I
was expecting...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Yaeno Muteki is seriously concerned
about her skin issues.
